title: Can I include tasks within a project table
excerpt: I want to use Monday to track projects and then track tasks within projects–is this possible? It seems I can only add more projects

posts.author: cconnacher (Claire)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to use Monday to track projects and then track tasks within projects–is this possible? It seems I can only add more projects

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Claire,

How are you currently logging projects? If this is using items, could you use subitems instead to log tasks within each of those projects? Feel free to elaborate!
